name: Chicken and Mixed Vegetables with Shrimp Sauc
recipeInstructions:
1. Preparation: Wash and soak mushrooms in warm water for 45 minutes; remove stems; slice caps into thin strips. Wash bell pepper; slice in half lengthwise; slice into long, thin strips. Remove chicken meat from bone; pick meat apart into shreds. Wash green onions; cut off roots and discard; shred green tops and whites. Peel and slice fresh ginger root into thin matchsticks. Rinse bean sprouts to remove any loose pieces.
2. Place bean sprouts and sliced pepper in a colander in a larger bowl. Pour boiling water over vegetables to cover. Steep for 2 minutes. Remove colander from hot water; flush vegetables with cold water.
3. Stir-frying: Heat oil in wok until it just begins to smoke. Stir-fry mushrooms for 30 seconds. Add chicken and ginger sticks; stir-fry another 30 seconds. Push ingredients up side of wok. Add stock, sherry, and sugar; bring to boil; then add shrimp sauce and cornstarch paste; stir liquids until fairly thick.
4. Return vegetables, plus bean sprouts and peppers. Stir-fry for another minute until everything is hot. Add green onions. Serve. Gravy will tend to thin as sprouts give off liquid, so be sure it is thick to start.
